testsuite.name: ParticleBuilder

testcase.name: builds all shape types without error
builds circle shape and plays without error

testsuite.system-out: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build what is described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker.
